palette_hint: off-white background (#f4f1ec), near-black text (#1a1a18), deep teal primary accent (#0e6b6b), and warm amber highlight (#d97c0e)
type_style: Georgia or serif for display headings (bold, large), system sans-serif (Arial/Helvetica) for body and nav, clean and authoritative feel
description: A three-day industrial technology and manufacturing futures conference called IRONCLAD 2025, held in Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania.
constraints: light theme — off-white page background, near-black text, teal for section headings and buttons, amber for highlights and badges
fixed-width centered container of 1080px with consistent left/right padding
top nav: conference logo/name on the left in bold serif, five page links on the right in small-caps sans-serif
all pages share a footer with two columns: left shows conference name + tagline, right shows date, venue, and contact email
buttons use teal background (#0e6b6b), white text, 6px border-radius, no hover effects
cards and grid cells have a 1px solid #c8c2b8 border and 8px border-radius

page_specs.home: Full-width hero banner (teal background, white text) with the headline 'IRONCLAD 2025' in large serif, subtitle 'Forging the Future of Industrial Technology', dates 'October 14–16, 2025 · Pittsburgh, PA', and a Register Now button. Below the hero, a 3-column grid highlights three conference themes: Advanced Materials, Smart Factories, and Sustainable Energy, each with an icon-emoji, bold title, and two-sentence description.
page_specs.agenda: Page heading 'Conference Agenda' followed by three day-sections (Day 1, Day 2, Day 3) each rendered as a structured grid with columns for Time, Session Title, and Speaker/Room. Each day lists six sessions including keynotes, panels, and breaks, with keynote rows visually distinguished by an amber left border.
page_specs.speakers: Page heading 'Featured Speakers' above a 3-column grid of eight speaker cards. Each card contains a rectangular teal placeholder block for the speaker photo, the speaker's full name in bold, their title and organization in smaller text, and a one-sentence talk topic description.
page_specs.workshops: Page heading 'Pre-Conference Workshops' with a brief intro paragraph explaining that workshops run on October 14 and require separate registration. Below, four workshop cards arranged in a 2×2 grid each show workshop title, facilitator name, duration, capacity (e.g. 'Max 30 attendees'), and a short two-sentence description of what participants will learn.
page_specs.register: Page heading 'Register for IRONCLAD 2025' with a two-column layout: the left column contains a registration form with fields for Full Name, Organization, Email, Job Title, a dropdown for ticket type, and a Submit Registration button; the right column lists three ticket tiers (Professional $895, Academic $445, Student $195) as stacked info boxes showing what each tier includes, with the Professional tier box outlined in teal as the recommended option.
